SML.Title: Sephral's Module Loadouts
SML.Settings.Menu.Name: Sephral's Module Loadouts
SML.Settings.Menu.Label: Open Loadout Manager
SML.Settings.Menu.Hint: Save, compare, apply, export, and import module activation profiles for this world or for your whole installation.
SML.Settings.Theme.Name: Manager design
SML.Settings.Theme.Hint: Choose whether the loadout manager uses the Signature look or a Foundry-style appearance.
SML.Manager.ControlsHint: Save the current state or move profiles in and out as JSON. The design switch now lives in the module settings.
SML.Manager.PermissionWarning: Only users with module management permission can change or apply loadouts.
SML.Manager.AvailabilityBlocked: package is not compatible with this world
SML.Manager.AvailabilityWarning: package is not fully verified for this environment
SML.Manager.EmptyBody: Save the current module state to create your first reusable module loadout.
SML.Dialog.SaveCurrent.Title: Save Current Module Loadout
SML.Dialog.Profile.Name: Profile name
SML.Dialog.Edit.Title: Edit Module Loadout '{name}'
SML.Dialog.Duplicate.Title: Duplicate Module Loadout '{name}'
SML.Dialog.Replace.Title: Replace Existing Profile
SML.Dialog.Replace.Content: A profile named '{name}' already exists. Replace it with the current active module state?
SML.Dialog.Delete.Title: Delete Module Loadout
SML.Dialog.Preflight.Title: Apply Loadout '{name}'
SML.Notification.NoChanges: The selected profile already matches the current active module configuration.
SML.Notification.MissingModules: These modules are referenced by the profile but are not installed here: {modules}.
SML.Notification.BlockingDependencies: Cannot apply this profile because required dependencies are missing or unavailable: {details}
SML.Notification.ManageModulesRequired: You do not have permission to manage module activation in this world.
SML.Import.Invalid: The selected file does not contain any valid module loadout profiles.
